properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some just see someone Down on their knees Talkin' to the air Words lost on a breeze

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some just see tear drops Fallin' to the floor Just a waste of time Not anything more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But it's a direct line to the throne room Where you can find someone who cares And if you need some proof, I can tell you There is power, power in prayer

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can tell you 'bout the time The Lord gave me peace With trouble all around He calmed the storm in me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I remember when I cried out He saved my soul, yeah Some have their doubts But I know that I know, that I know

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: That it's a direct line to the throne room Where you can find someone who cares And if you need some proof, I can tell you There is power, power in prayer

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He's always listening (ah-ooh) And that don't change (ah-ooh) Don't miss this moment (ah-ooh) To call on His name

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: But it's a direct line to the throne room (oh, yes it is) Where you can find, you can find someone who cares And if you need some proof, I can tell you There is power, power in prayer
